name: The Tinplate Company of India Limited
summary: The Tinplate Company of India Limited manufactures and supplies tin coated and tin free steel sheets in India. It offers electrolytic tinplates, tin-free steel sheets, lacquered/coated electrolytic tinplate sheets, and printed electrolytic tinplate sheets. Its products are used in packaging edible oil, processed foods, paints, pesticides, battery jackets, aerosol cans, and crown corks, as well as sprays and beverages. The company also exports its products. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Kolkata, India. The Tinplate Company of India Limited is a subsidiary of Tata Steel Limited.
